subject: Add story reaction/engagement indicators to Campaign page
description: GoFundMe shows a reaction emoji row (heart, pray, clap) under the story with counts. Add pre-seeded reaction counts below the campaign story section. No real interactivity needed - display-only with plausible fixture counts. Adds social proof that the story resonated. Could use lucide icons: Heart, HandHeart, MessageCircle with counts like "142 hearts, 89 prayers, 24 comments".

changes: Added reaction pills (hearts/prayers/comments) below story in campaign card
Counts derived from backerCount with fixed ratios (38%/22%/6%)
